name: Spicy Tomato Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring half a cup of tomato juice to boil.
2. Add gelatin and stir until dissolved.
3. Add the remaining ingredients.
4. Blend thoroughly.
5. Chill the mixture.
6. Shake before serving. (Gelatin makes the dressing thick.)
Food Exchange per serving: FREE FOOD

Source: Sugar Free...That's Me By Judith S. Majors
